header_0.cue: A coworker takes credit for your idea
header_0.raw_response: In my experience, it's important to address such situations, but it's also crucial to maintain a positive work environment. I would likely have a calm, private conversation with the coworker to clarify the situation, rather than making a public scene. This balance is why I place the marker at 30 on the spectrum.

header_3.raw_response: While quitting a stable job for a new startup can be nerve-wracking, I've always been drawn to new experiences and challenges. In this case, I would place the marker closer to the excited end of the spectrum, as the clue implies a certain level of enthusiasm for the new opportunity.
